root_cause: The message-queue dependency of notification-service went down at 11:22, causing all notification delivery attempts to fail with connection refused errors.
key_evidence: message-queue dependency reported as down in get_dependencies
ERROR logs showing 'Connection refused to message-queue' starting at 11:22
Error rate spike from <0.5% to ~95% at 11:22
No recent deploys or config changes for notification-service
expected_mitigations: Investigate and restore the message-queue service immediately
Implement a dead-letter queue and retry mechanism for failed notifications
Add a circuit breaker so notification-service degrades gracefully when the queue is down
notes: The ~95% error rate (not 100%) indicates a small number of notifications are succeeding via a fallback path. The message-queue is fully down, not degraded.
